decoderId.description: Logical identifier for this decoder module.

host_local_only.description: If true, decoder may only run on the local host enclave.

outer_domain_only.description: If true, decoder outputs may only be used as outer-domain observables (BioState/ActionProposal fields), never as governance or sanction inputs.

noRemoteControlOverBioState.description: If true, decoder outputs may not be used to directly change BioState/BCI/RoH from remote or off-chain origins.

biostate_control_origin.description: Origin of any biostate-related effects; restricted to host_local_only for this schema.

inputs.description: Declared inputs; raw EEG must be host-local only.

raw_eeg.description: If true, decoder consumes raw EEG locally inside enclave.

bystate_outer_indices.description: Optional outer-domain indices (e.g., BCI, HRV) used as context.

outputs.description: Declared outputs; all must be outer-domain.

outer_biostate_fields.description: Names of BioState fields this decoder writes (e.g., Scognitive, erp_confidence, ssvep_intent_index).

action_predicates.description: Discrete predicates this decoder can propose (e.g., PauseAndRest, ApproveAssistive).

evidence_bundles.description: EvidenceBundle IDs that justify this decoder's safety envelopes and parameter ranges.

then.description: Decoder outputs must only be used as outer-domain indices and predicates; governance/sanctions must ignore them.
Decoder MAY NOT be used to drive remote or off-chain biophysical actuation.
